solution_html:
x2−5x+7=0 Gi g~j α n‡j, bZzb mgxKi‡Yi g~j, y=α−1 ∴α=y+1

Alternative:

=7−5+1=3  ∴x2−3x+3=0

Choose the right option to fill in the gap in the following sentence.

“A number of interesting ______ made”.
Antonym for ‘enmity’ is-
One of the common _______.
options_html: phenomenon is that most people are doing crimes now
phenomena is that most people are committing crimes now
phenome is that most people are committing crimes now
phenomena is that most people are committed crimes now
correct_answer_html: phenomena is that most people are committing crimes now

question_html: Identify the correct spelling.
Educating all people _____ a mammoth task.
My beloved mother forbade me_______.
options_html: not to get involved in militancy

question_html: I don’t like sushi and ______.
Which of the following sentences is correct?
options_html: Fruits wouldn’t ripen if the sun didn’t shine.
Fruits did not ripen if the sun didn’t shine.
Fruits will not ripen if the sun didn’t shine.
Fruits have not riped if the sun didn’t shine.
correct_answer_html: Fruits wouldn’t ripen if the sun didn’t shine.

question_html: Times have changed and so_____.
A teacher always prefers that every single student _____.
Which one is an adverb?
What does the expression ‘to burn the midnight oil’ mean?
options_html: To stay awake all night working
To work hard to make money
correct_answer_html: To stay awake all night working

question_html: Make it passive: “He annoyed me.”
Turn to the direct form of speech: Rani said that her brother had been getting married.
options_html: Rani said, “Her brother is getting married.”
Rani told, “My brother has gotten married.”
Rani said, “My brother is getting married.”
Rani said, “My brother was getting married.”
correct_answer_html: Rani said, “My brother was getting married.”

question_html: Make it interrogative: “Our life is nothing but a walking shadow.”
options_html: Is our life nothing but a walking shadow?
What is our life but a walking shadow?
Is our life something but a walking shadow?
Is our life nothing without a walking shadow?
correct_answer_html: What is our life but a walking shadow?
